decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from osteochondral lesion of the talus despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after osteochondral lesion of the talus treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
